roadmap.title: Product Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: One place for the whole team to see what we're building, who owns it, and where it stands.

items.title: Report Panel Question not able to see and Change
"Created by" option to be added in "create test" option
items.note:
When someone creates a test, a "created by" option should be visible so that we can make sure to hold the right person accountable
note: If its imported or uploaded by a tool then the option will be pre filled with the name of the tool eg response sheet checker or universal test scrapper made by dubuddy tech team

items.title: New options to be added to assign user section
items.note:
When someone clicks on "assign user" following boxes should be visible:
1. Select User 
2. Select workflow stage (drafting questions, drafting solution, chapter tagging, verification stage 1, verification by Head, verification by end user, add another stage i.e we are able to add a stage on our own) [give option to select multiple workflow stages]
3. Add number of assigned user 
4. Add email of assigned user
5. An option to give product access to the user jiska number upar select kiya hua hai 

Assign user option can only be used by the head

items.title: Preview link of app needed in the panel (just like the website)
A test can be unpublished or published by clicking on the published button
items.note: Refer to this interactive mockup (exam category section): https://team-roadmap-eight.vercel.app/admin-mockup.html

items.title: Question Report V2 Column Changes
items.note:
Add the following columns:
1. a row of check boxes just like the exam category section (to select number of reported ques)
2. assigned to 
3. subject 
4. type (pyq, mock, chapterwise)
5. chapter name 
6. shift name 
7. question number 
8. preview ques option (app + website)
9. Source
10. Edit Question
11. reported by 
12. history 
13. device 
14. language medium 

reference: https://team-roadmap-eight.vercel.app/admin-mockup.html

items.title: A filter should be added to every column
items.note:
In Exam Category Mgt: 
1. status
2. published state
3. user 
4. created by 

In Question Reports V2
1. category 
2. last reported at 
3. status
4. assigned to 
5. subject
6. chapter name 
7. type
8. shift name 
9. device
10 language medium 


Reference: https://team-roadmap-eight.vercel.app/admin-mockup.html

items.title: Reported by sub section of question reports v2 section changes
items.note:
Under this sub section a list should open of all uniques users who reported, on top of it there should be a button to filter out whether it was reported by our internal team or end user 
refer:https://team-roadmap-eight.vercel.app/admin-mockup.html

items.title: On top of ques reports v2 section following buttons are needed
items.note:
1. exam type ( a dropdown to select exam wise reports), first attached image 
2. publish all changes (this button would publish all the the status marked as "unpublished change" though if we use and select 6 out of 10 then only 6 will be published 
3. Resolved questions:  all the ques published will be transferred to this list and mot be a part of our other reported ques
4. Analytics (to be discussed in another task)

items.title: Analytics Button on Ques Reports V2
items.note:
After clicking this button, we will be able to see an overall report of all reported ques 
filters will be mentioned above to select only those exams or tests or subjects we want to get the summary of 

note: there is also a button of view ques on this screen, when clicked it will transfer us to the first screen with set filters 

only 2 more filters to be added apart from subject, type, exam and category 
i,e language medium and device used to report 

refer: https://team-roadmap-eight.vercel.app/admin-mockup.html
